code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut word = ""
  mut in_word = false
  mut first_word = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if in_word
        if not first_word
          result = "#{result} "
        end
        result = "#{result}#{word}"
        first_word = false
        word = ""
        in_word = false
      end
    else
      if not in_word
        if b >= 97 and b <= 122
          let up = b - 32
          word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(up)}"
        else
          word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
        in_word = true
      else
        word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_word
    if not first_word
      result = "#{result} "
    end
    result = "#{result}#{word}"
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  println(process(line))
when None
  println("")
end
